## Type of Change
- [ ] Feature (`feature/`)
- [ ] Bug Fix (`bugfix/`)
- [ ] Refactor (`refactor/`)
- [ ] Documentation (`docs/`)

## Quality Checklist
- [ ] My branch follows the project's naming conventions (e.g., `feature/`, `bugfix/`).
- [ ] I have run `npm test` locally and all unit tests pass successfully.
- [ ] My code introduces no breaking changes to the generic routing gateway.
